roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOT ADD TO CAL CLARIFY SENTENCE AS  PAPER COMMITMENT  FILED

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO CLARIFY SENTENCE AS PAPER COMMITMENT/CTORD:THAT THEDEFENSE MOTION TO CLARIFY SENTENCE AS A PAPER  COMMITMENT IS GRANTED/CTORD:THAT THE 12-05-14 SENTENCE IS AMENDED AS FOLLOWS, ONLY AS TO CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED:/CTORD:THAT THIS IS A STRIKE CONVICTION THAT WAS PLED OPEN TO HON, SAMUEL FENG:/AJW/CH1:SP 2 Y:L/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 635 ACTUAL DAYS COUNTY JAIL,   95 DAYS SAGE CREDITS FOR A TOTAL OF 730 DAYS/2933,1(C)/DNACOMP/STATES/COA:40/ICNA/VF5:300/PAR/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FORSENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANTTO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:12-24-14/PAR70/

/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   1/X: THE COURT DISMISSES COUNT 2 PURSUANT TO 1385PC/X: THIS IS A PLEA OPENTO THE COURT- JUDGE SAMUEL FENG; PLEA TO A STRIKE; NO ARBUCKLE TAKEN/X: THE DEFENDANT ADMITS ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 12022(B)(1)PC AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD,/FNDG/PRES: 12-05-14/REMA/CONTD: SENTENCING/DOP/
